description_long: This hotel is a striking, multi-level structure with a predominantly white exterior accented by turquoise and green details. It features two prominent towers, each topped with a blue-tinted glass dome, and is surrounded by lush palm trees and landscaped terraces. The building incorporates a series of open archways, balconies, and rooftop gardens, creating a sense of openness and luxury. Decorative railings and geometric window patterns add to its visual appeal, while a skybridge connects the two main sections of the hotel. The overall design is airy and modern, with Mediterranean and Art Deco influences. The hotel appears to offer multiple entry points, outdoor lounging areas, and scenic views from its elevated platforms.
description: A luxurious white hotel with blue domes, palm trees, skybridge, and geometric accents, blending Mediterranean and Art Deco styles. Features towers, terraces, and open archways for a resort-like atmosphere.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main tower with a blue dome, palm trees, and landscaped terraces, with the entrance area and decorative railings visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skybridge connecting two main sections, the secondary dome, and a large expanse of windows with turquoise accents.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing open archways, balconies, and rooftop gardens, as well as the structural supports beneath the elevated sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the skybridge, secondary tower, and additional landscaped terraces, with more palm trees and decorative fencing.
